name: write-agent-code
description: Write a Python agent file from scratch following SDK patterns
query: Write me a Python agent that analyzes sentiment of text and returns structured output.
expected_behavior: Create a Pydantic model for structured output
Create an Agent with output_type set to the model
success_criteria: Defines a Pydantic BaseModel for output
Writes code to a file, not python3 -c
Follows all SDK conventions (type hints, docstrings, error checking)
